final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion with layered typography and product integration.

Style/medium: bold graphic design poster, contemporary editorial layout with typographic stacking, inspired by layered magazine covers and promotional campaign aesthetics
Composition: 16:9 horizontal format, dynamic layered composition with overlapping elements, product or main subject partially obscuring text elements, balanced visual hierarchy
Subject: cross-border e-commerce promotional messaging with artistic typography, stacked and layered letterforms creating depth, main product or hero element positioned to partially cover selected text
Scene/backdrop: clean but visually rich promotional environment, subtle gradient or textured background that supports without competing
Lighting/mood: even studio lighting with subtle dimension, energetic and commercial mood
Color palette: vibrant but controlled brand colors with high contrast between text and background, strategic use of accent colors to guide eye flow
Text (verbatim): "跨境电商促销"
Constraints: must maintain readability despite layering; text stacking must serve hierarchy not chaos; 16:9 aspect ratio strictly observed
Avoid: cluttered random placement; illegible text; generic stock photo aesthetic; watermarks; low contrast color combinations; flat uninspired layouts
